moments.title: World Cup Final Showdown
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 final takes place this Sunday, with the two best teams battling it out for global glory at MetLife Stadium.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! Who are you backing to lift the World Cup trophy on Sunday? The biggest game in football is almost here. #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Global Glory
angles.copy: The World Cup Final: one game, two teams, global glory. Get ready for Sunday's showdown, it's going to be epic!

angles.name: Who's In?
angles.copy: Sunday's World Cup Final is set! Who's made it to the biggest stage in sport? Tune in for all the drama.

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins this Thursday at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, with the world's best golfers competing for the coveted Claret Jug.

angles.name: Major Golf Action
angles.copy: Golf's most prestigious major, The Open, tees off at Royal Birkdale this Thursday. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Historic Tournament
angles.copy: The historic Open Championship is back! All eyes on Royal Birkdale from Thursday as the world's best battle it out.

angles.name: Who Will Win?
angles.copy: It's Open Championship week! Get ready for four days of incredible golf starting Thursday. Who are you rooting for?

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The iconic Tour de France continues its epic journey across France, with cyclists tackling challenging stages throughout the week.

angles.name: Peloton Powers On
angles.copy: The peloton powers on! The Tour de France is still delivering thrills and spills this week. Catch up on the latest stage results. #TourDeFrance

angles.name: Yellow Jersey Watch
angles.copy: Yellow jersey watch! The Tour de France continues its gruelling journey. Who's in the lead as we head deeper into the race?

angles.name: Epic Stages
angles.copy: More epic cycling this week as the Tour de France rolls on. Don't miss the drama as riders push for glory.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: One of the UK's most beloved music and arts festivals, Latitude, opens its gates next weekend in Suffolk, featuring a diverse line-up.

angles.name: Festival Fever
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is almost here! Suffolk is about to come alive with music, comedy and arts from next Friday. Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: Get Ready for Latitude
angles.copy: Get ready for Latitude! The countdown is on for one of the UK's best festivals, bringing big names and good vibes to Suffolk next weekend.

angles.name: Packing Your Wellies?
angles.copy: Packing your wellies? Latitude Festival kicks off next Friday! Excited for the music, the laughs, and the whole experience?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Wraps Up
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green hosted another huge weekend for TRNSMT Festival, as thousands enjoyed performances from major artists.

angles.name: TRNSMT Highlights
angles.copy: What a weekend at TRNSMT! Glasgow Green was buzzing with incredible music. Who did you see and what was your highlight? #TRNSMT

angles.name: Still Buzzing?
angles.copy: TRNSMT 2026 is officially over! From massive headliners to emerging acts, it delivered. What was your favourite moment?

angles.name: Festival Memories
angles.copy: Still buzzing from TRNSMT? We're already looking back at an amazing weekend of live music from Glasgow Green!

moments.title: Who's Number One?
moments.blurb: The latest Official UK Singles Chart was announced last Friday, revealing who holds the top spot as the summer anthems dominate.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: The latest Official UK Singles Chart is in! Who's holding onto the Number 1 spot this week? Find out now. #UKCharts

angles.name: Summer Anthems
angles.copy: Summer anthems dominating the charts? We've got the lowdown on the Official UK Singles Chart. Any surprises this week?

angles.name: Top 40 Lowdown
angles.copy: Who's making waves in the charts? The Official UK Singles Chart was announced last Friday. What's your favourite from the Top 40?

moments.title: House of the Dragon Continues
moments.blurb: The battle for the Iron Throne rages on in the latest episodes of House of the Dragon Season 2, currently airing weekly.

angles.name: Dragons Are Flying
angles.copy: The Dragons are still flying! House of the Dragon Season 2 continues with more gripping episodes this week. Are you team Green or Black?

angles.name: Westeros Drama
angles.copy: Still hooked on House of the Dragon? The latest episodes are delivering all the Westeros drama we love. What's been your favourite moment so far?

angles.name: Iron Throne Battle
angles.copy: The fight for the Iron Throne rages on! Don't miss the new episodes of House of the Dragon Season 2, available now.

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Schools across England and Wales are breaking up this week and next, marking the official start of the long summer holidays for millions of pupils.

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: Freedom! Schools across England and Wales are breaking up this week and next for the summer holidays. What are your plans?

angles.name: Great Getaway
angles.copy: The great summer getaway begins! With schools finishing up, the roads are about to get busy. Where are you heading for your holidays?

angles.name: Summer To-Do List
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially here (or almost)! Wishing all students a fantastic break. What's top of your summer to-do list?

moments.title: Happy 80th, Linda Ronstadt!
moments.blurb: Celebrated singer Linda Ronstadt, known for hits like 'You're No Good' and 'Blue Bayou', turns 80 tomorrow.

angles.name: 80 Years of Linda
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the legendary Linda Ronstadt turns 80! What's your favourite track from her incredible career? #LindaRonstadt

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: Happy 80th for tomorrow to the iconic Linda Ronstadt! A true voice of a generation. Celebrate with her greatest hits.

angles.name: Saluting a Star
angles.copy: Linda Ronstadt hits the big 8-0 tomorrow! Let's salute the multi-Grammy winner and her amazing contribution to music.

moments.title: Stewart Copeland Turns 74
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Police, Stewart Copeland, celebrates his 74th birthday this Thursday.

angles.name: Police Drummer's Day
angles.copy: The Police's legendary drummer, Stewart Copeland, celebrates his 74th birthday this Thursday! What's your favourite Police track? #StewartCopeland

angles.name: Still Smashing It
angles.copy: Happy 74th for Thursday to the incredible Stewart Copeland! Still smashing it. What's your top Police song?

angles.name: Rhythmic Powerhouse
angles.copy: He's 74 on Thursday! Stewart Copeland, the rhythmic powerhouse behind The Police. Time to crank up 'Roxanne'!

moments.title: Brian May's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday this Friday.

angles.name: Queen Legend's Day
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday this Friday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo? #BrianMay

angles.name: Still Rocking
angles.copy: Queen's guitar legend Brian May celebrates his 79th this Friday. Still rocking stages worldwide! What's your go-to Queen anthem?

angles.name: 79 Years Young
angles.copy: Seventy-nine years young! Brian May, the iconic guitarist from Queen, has a birthday this Friday. Let's celebrate with some classic rock!

moments.title: Happy 79th, Carlos Santana!
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, whose career spans decades and genres, turns 79 this Saturday.

angles.name: Santana's Day
angles.copy: The legendary Carlos Santana turns 79 this Saturday! Which of his timeless tracks gets you moving? #CarlosSantana

angles.name: Guitar Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th for Saturday to the incredible Carlos Santana! A guitar icon whose music transcends generations.

angles.name: Magic Touch
angles.copy: Still got that magic touch! Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday this Saturday. Turn up the volume for a true legend!

moments.title: Cat Stevens Turns 78
moments.blurb: The influential folk-rock artist Cat Stevens, now known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday this Sunday.

angles.name: Folk-Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 78th birthday this Sunday to the brilliant Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam! What's your favourite of his classic songs? #CatStevens

angles.name: Timeless Music
angles.copy: He's 78 on Sunday! Celebrate the timeless music of Cat Stevens / Yusuf Islam. Which track takes you back?

angles.name: Beautiful Songs
angles.copy: A true folk-rock icon turns 78 this Sunday! Cat Stevens, responsible for so many beautiful songs. What's your go-to?

moments.title: Don Henley is 79!
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and iconic vocalist/drummer Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday this Monday.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Eagles legend Don Henley turns 79 this Monday! What's your favourite Eagles track featuring his iconic vocals? #DonHenley

angles.name: Rock Giant
angles.copy: Happy 79th for Monday to the incredible Don Henley! From 'Hotel California' to his solo hits, a true rock giant.

angles.name: 79 Years of Rock
angles.copy: Seventy-nine years of rock greatness! Don Henley, co-founder of the Eagles, celebrates his birthday this Monday. What a voice!

moments.title: Slash Turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' legendary guitarist, Slash, celebrates his 61st birthday next Tuesday.

angles.name: GNR Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st birthday next Tuesday to the one and only Slash! What's your favourite Guns N' Roses riff? #Slash

angles.name: Still Shredding
angles.copy: Still shredding at 61! Guns N' Roses' legendary guitarist Slash celebrates his birthday next Tuesday. Time for some classic rock!

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Slash turns 61 next Tuesday! The top hat, the guitar, the riffs... an absolute rock icon. What's your favourite GNR song?

moments.title: Happy 57th, J.Lo!
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her music, acting and dance, celebrates her 57th birthday next Wednesday.

angles.name: J.Lo's Day
angles.copy: Happy 57th birthday next Wednesday to the global superstar, J.Lo! What's your favourite Jennifer Lopez hit? #JLo

angles.name: Jenny From The Block
angles.copy: Still Jenny from the Block! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 next Wednesday. Celebrate with her chart-topping tracks and iconic moves.

angles.name: Global Icon
angles.copy: She's 57 next Wednesday! The incredible Jennifer Lopez, a true force in music, film, and fashion. What's your favourite J.Lo moment?

moments.title: Taboo is 51!
moments.blurb: Taboo, a key member of the Black Eyed Peas, celebrates his 51st birthday today.

angles.name: BEP Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st birthday today to Taboo from Black Eyed Peas! What's your favourite BEP anthem? #Taboo

angles.name: Pump It Up
angles.copy: He's 51 today! Taboo, one-quarter of the Black Eyed Peas, celebrating his birthday. Get ready to 'Pump It'!

angles.name: Birthday Shout-Out
angles.copy: Birthday shout-out to Taboo from Black Eyed Peas, who turns 51 today! What's your favourite track from the group?
